requestedIntent: Reduce ACEF friction found in real guarded product work without weakening evidence, especially around dirty-tree evidence capture, completed active-run context validation, and stale worker-scope recovery diagnostics.
limitations: This preserves clean-tree as the certification gate; it only allows evidence capture during a dirty working tree by recording dirty application paths in the evidence manifest.
Conductor/worker separation still depends on worker scope hooks and Process Judge checks; this change does not make every client runtime enforce persona isolation automatically.
Lean profile selection is documented guidance unless paired with lane-selection and closeout validators in the target repo.
